face.structure: oval with angular jawline, high cheekbones, and a narrow chin

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with a pronounced outer edge
eyes.color: rich amber with flecks of gold
details: dark, defined eyelashes enhancing upper eye line
soft gradient shading from a deeper hue at the limbal ring

face.expression: a contemplative and slightly distant look suggesting deep thought

skin.rendering_notes: lightly diffused with subtle highlights on the nose and brow

hair.color: midnight black with subtle blue highlights
hair.style: long and straight with a slight wave at the ends
hair.flow: cascading smoothly over shoulders with a silky texture
details: a thin braid runs behind the right ear for a touch of complexity

character.aura: an enigmatic and impenetrable presence, like a dark, swirling mist

outfit.base: dark velvet coat with a high collar
outfit.design: minimalist with sharp, clean lines and subtle silver thread detailing
details: sleeves feature fine embroidery that catches the light
inner lining is a deep crimson, barely visible
outfit.fit: tailored close to the body, emphasizing a lean frame

composition.pose: seated with a slight forward lean, indicative of engagement in thought
composition.gesture: one hand lightly touching the neckline of the coat, index and thumb barely separated

background.color_palette: dark hues of indigo and charcoal, with faint traces of violet
background.details: soft, swirling patterns creating a sense of movement
background.rules: should not distract from the character, only complement by enhancing aura
